choose a throne:

Event: Magic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 20/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T158
Sorcerous Ball Elder Totem

When attacking, the unit has a 65% chance to launch fireballs at 3 random enemy units. When the fireballs hit, they deal 125000 magic damage to the targets, and start incinerating them for 3 sec. During that time, the units being incinerated receive 46875 pure damage every second, and all enemy units in a small radius around them receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

- Level 20
When attacking, the unit has a 65% chance to launch fireballs at 3 random enemy units. When the fireballs hit, they deal 250000 magic damage to the targets, and start incinerating them for 4 sec. During that time, the units being incinerated receive 93750 pure damage every second, and all enemy units in a small radius around them receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

- Level 40
When attacking, the unit has a 65% chance to launch fireballs at 3 random enemy units. When the fireballs hit, they deal 500000 magic damage to the targets, and start incinerating them for 5 sec. During that time, the units being incinerated receive 187500 pure damage every second, and all enemy units in a small radius around them receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90
